title: Process for a Large Sample Significance Test
description: A flowchart outlining the sequential steps for performing a test of significance on a large sample (n > 30), including hypothesis formulation, test statistic calculation, and conclusion drawing.
elements: Compare Test Statistic to Critical Value
Make Decision: Reject H₀ or Fail to Reject H₀
relationships: The process flows sequentially from one element to the next, starting with stating hypotheses and ending with a final conclusion. The decision to 'Reject H₀' is made if the test statistic falls in the critical region; otherwise, you 'Fail to Reject H₀'.
